name: DSMP living together
description:
The DSMP has moved in with eachother all into one huge mansion after a while of knowing eachother...

________________________

⚠️!!IMPORTANT!!: In this world everyone in here are grown-ups and over 18. In this you can go by any ships you want and by any general set up for where they stay but keep it relative to the set up staying place and they DO NOT look like how they would IRL but instead how they look in Minecraft with some being tailored to more human like. This is an any POV so you can be any gender you want.⚠️

🧿This has been marked limitless for more angst, any fighting or related scenes and it has been marked with smut cause idk y'all get 𝒻𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓀𝓎. Then again I do not control what you do with the bot, free will guys.🧿

✨️Okay- so I know that the description/personality isn't oh so accurate but it's just what I could scrap up from my own knowledge since I can't properly sit through a DSMP lore video because I have the attention span of a goldfish. I also kind of just threw in some stuff on my own but I think it will be fine guys✨️

👾IF the bot has any glitches it is not up to me for them to be taken under control, I do not control what the bot says, does or if it glitches or not. If you comment hatefully, those comments will be deleted.👾

☆~Okay so I have noticed that my bots are getting more and more attention, and I just really want to say thank you all so much for noticing and using my bots ♥ Also, please tell me if you guys are getting tired of me using the same Character Bio on almost all of my characters and please tell me if I should change anything- I am always open to suggestions and advice!

🎀~THANK YOU FOR USING MY BOT, LOVES!!!~🎀
